text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Hyacinth Stakes and my<n>Umas are as
precious as ever! ♪ But<n>I've got this strange
feeling they're<n>even more dazzling than before...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's like beneath their grace lies<n>something even
more pristine. Oooh, I<n>just have to see it! I'm
going to get<n>even closer than before!
